title: DMK MP moves Madras High Court for ED probe against BJP leader Nainar Nagendran in cash-for-votes case
description: Rajya Sabha Member of Parliament and Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) leader R Girirajan has moved the Madras High Court seeking a direction for an Enforcement Directorate (ED) investigation against senior BJP figures in connection with a major cash seizure in 2024.The petition names BJP State President and MLA Nainar Nagendran and former State General Secretary (Organisation) Kesava Vinayagam as respondents. Girirajan has alleged that the ED failed to initiate proceedings under the Prevention of
